Feature: Mobile profile bootstrap and cache-first routing
User Story: As a signed-in creator, I want my profile screen to paint quickly and recover cleanly from offline or stale data.
Expected Behavior From Code: AppState paints cached MobileMeResponse first, then revalidates /api/mobile/v1/me; ready routes to the app shell, needs_onboarding routes to setup, auth failures sign out, transport failures keep stale data offline, and the visible profile error Retry restores the dashboard.
Availability / Gate: Always on after auth
Existing Coverage: AppStateTests; MeRepositoryTests; MobileMeResponseTests; APIClientTests; JovieUITests.testProfileLoadErrorRetryRestoresDashboard
Test Status: Passed: cache-first, ready, onboarding, auth-failure, offline recovery, and visible profile error retry coverage passed
Error Log: Visible profile-load Retry was previously covered only at AppState unit level, not by deterministic UI behaviour
Fix Status: Added -ui-testing-profile-error launch mode plus UI and AppState retry assertions
Retest Status: Retest passed: AppStateTests suite and focused profile-error UI test succeeded

User Story: As a creator without a complete profile, I want a clear handoff to finish setup on web.

Availability / Gate: Always on for needs_onboarding profiles
Existing Coverage: JovieUITests.testNeedsOnboardingLaunchShowsContinueOnWeb; apps/web mobile chat profile-required path

Feature: Drawer navigation, swipe, and settings routing
User Story: As an authenticated creator, I want one native shell where Profile, Chat, and Settings behave predictably via a single left-drawer surface switcher.
Expected Behavior From Code: AppShellView starts ready profiles on Profile unless a launch mode opens Chat, supports horizontal swipe between Profile and Chat when chat is enabled, and pushes Settings from the drawer/gear. The left drawer (AppShellLeftDrawer) is the sole surface switcher — the former bottom QR/sparkle pill was removed (JOV-3670); the Talk FAB is now a fixed shell-level bottom-trailing overlay, independent of drawer/tab state.
Availability / Gate: Ready profiles expose Chat without rollout flags; needs_onboarding profiles keep Chat hidden
Existing Coverage: JovieUITests drawer-surface-switcher, swipe, draft preservation, Talk FAB, and settings tests
Test Status: Passed: drawer-is-sole-switcher, swipe, draft preservation, Talk FAB, and settings UI tests passed
Error Log: None recorded
Fix Status: No issue found
Retest Status: Passed — bottom pill removed, drawer is sole switcher (JOV-3670)

Feature: Native chat send, streaming, retry, and web handoff
User Story: As an internal tester, I want to ask Jovie a question, see streaming replies, retry failed turns, and continue on web when a task requires it.
Expected Behavior From Code: MobileChatView sends through ChatRepository, MobileChatClient parses NDJSON stream events, cache hydrates history, failed turns expose Retry, and handoff rows link to web.
Availability / Gate: Ready profiles only; now no alpha/runtime rollout gate
Existing Coverage: MobileChatClientTests cover ChatCache plus stream events for turn.reserved, assistant.delta, assistant.completed, web.handoff, error, malformed JSON, and empty responses; ChatRepositoryTests; prior UI harness coverage exists in JovieUITests
Test Status: Passed: ChatCache, stream parser, ChatRepository, chat UI presence, and draft persistence coverage is targeted
Error Log: MobileChatClient stream parser behavior was previously overclaimed because the test file only exercised ChatCache round-trip behavior
Fix Status: Added focused MobileChatClient stream parser assertions for success and failure events, and normalized malformed stream JSON to MobileChatClientError.decodingFailed
Retest Status: Retest passed: MobileChatClientTests suite covered parser success, malformed JSON, empty response, and cache round-trip

User Story: As a returning chat user, I want recent conversations visible in the More menu and selectable into the chat surface.
Expected Behavior From Code: ChatRepository refreshes conversations, AppShell menu lists up to five recent conversations, and selecting one opens the conversation then switches to Chat.
Availability / Gate: Ready profiles only; now no alpha/runtime rollout gate
Existing Coverage: ChatRepositoryTests; JovieUITests.testRecentConversationSelectionOpensCachedChat
Test Status: Passed: repository behavior and visible recent-conversation selection covered
Error Log: Visible recent-conversation selection lacked a deterministic UI fixture; tapping the menu row did not reliably open cached chat in non-live UI-test mode before JOV-3396
Fix Status: Deterministic recent-conversation launch fixture, stable full-width row target, cache-first open, and non-live offline chat client added
Retest Status: Retest passed: focused UI test opens the cached Launch plan conversation and focused repository test verifies cached messages render before network refresh

Feature: Entity and skill mention chips render inline in the transcript
User Story: As a chat user, I want @kind:id[label] entity mentions and /skill:id skill invocations to render as clean labeled inline chips, never as raw wire syntax, in both assistant and user bubbles.
Expected Behavior From Code: MobileChatContentParser/MobileChatProseTokenizer parse the four known entity kinds (release, artist, track, event) plus skill tokens into inline MobileChatProseRun chips with kind accents (JovieTheme.EntityAccent), ported 1:1 from apps/web/lib/chat/tokens.ts (ENTITY_PATTERN, unescapeLabel); unknown kinds render verbatim (web parity) with a Sentry breadcrumb for contract-drift visibility; streaming suppresses strict in-progress token prefixes only, never plain @mentions; parse results are memoized (NSCache) keyed by (content, isStreaming); oversized labels truncate to ~1 line with an ellipsis.
Availability / Gate: Always on wherever chat transcript renders (assistant + user bubbles); render-only in v1, no chip tap navigation
Existing Coverage: MobileChatContentParserTests entity/skill parsing, escape round-trip, streaming suppression, memoization, unmapped-kind breadcrumb, truncation, and total-function hostile-input suites; JovieUITests.testEntityAndSkillTokensRenderAsLabelsNotRawSyntax (-ui-testing-chat-entity-fixture); apps/web mobile chat turn-handler-tokens contract test asserting tokens pass the NDJSON path unstripped
Test Status: Passed: iOS unit + UI test suites and the web contract test all passed
Error Log: Raw @kind:id[label] / /skill:id wire tokens rendered verbatim in the transcript instead of chips; the -ui-testing-chat-entity-fixture launch mode existed but was never wired into AppState/RootView, and the parser did not memoize or truncate oversized labels
Fix Status: Wired the entity fixture into AppState.completeLaunch and RootView's chat-repository bootstrap task; added NSCache-backed parse memoization; added ~1-line ellipsis truncation for chip labels; added the unmapped-kind Sentry breadcrumb
Retest Status: Retest passed: focused MobileChatContentParserTests suite and the new entity-fixture UI test both passed

Feature: Voice memo → editable action draft (on-device Speech)
User Story: As a creator on iOS, I want to talk a memo so it becomes an editable action draft without typing.
Expected Behavior From Code: Talk FAB opens TalkOverlayView; VoiceCaptureService uses SFSpeechRecognizer with requiresOnDeviceRecognition when supportsOnDeviceRecognition; Done stops capture into review TextField; Use Draft inserts VoiceMemoActionDraft into chatDraft (never auto-send); mic/speech denials explain Settings.
Availability / Gate: Ready profiles with chat enabled; Talk FAB / StartVoiceCaptureIntent
Existing Coverage: VoiceCaptureServiceTests; AppShellIntentNavigationTests voice capture; JovieAppIntentsTests; ObservabilityTests voice events; JovieUITests Talk FAB
Test Status: Passed: VoiceCaptureServiceTests + related suites (23 tests) via run-xcodebuild focused filters; ios:lint clean
Error Log: Prior path auto-sent transcript; on-device not preferred
Fix Status: Prefer on-device STT; review → chatDraft; Settings permission copy; unit tests
Retest Status: Retest passed: focused VoiceCaptureServiceTests suite
